title: Peppery Crispy Slovakian Cod Stir-fry
description: A light, peppery stir-fry featuring flaky cod fillets and sweet sultanas, perfect for a low‑calorie Slovakian-inspired dinner.
instructions: Wash the cod fillets and pat them dry. Cut into bite‑sized cubes.
Heat the olive oil in a large non‑stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion, bell pepper, and minced garlic; sauté for 3‑4 minutes until softened.
Increase the heat to high and add the cod cubes, seasoning with smoked paprika, chili flakes, salt, and pepper. Stir‑fry for 5‑6 minutes, turning occasionally, until the fish is opaque and flaky.
Pour in the soy sauce and quickly toss to coat the cod and vegetables evenly.
Add the sultanas and cook for another minute, just long enough to warm them through.
Finish by squeezing the lemon juice over the dish and stirring in chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, garnishing with extra parsley if desired.
